infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: PanditYatra uses your camera for sacred live puja video sessions, profile photos, and document verification.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: PanditYatra uses your microphone so you can speak clearly during sacred live puja audio and video sessions.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: PanditYatra accesses your photo library so you can choose profile photos and attach spiritual documents.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: PanditYatra saves booking confirmations, invoices, and Kundali chart screenshots to your PanditYatra album.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: PanditYatra uses your location while the app is open to find nearby pandits, prepare puja bookings, and calculate delivery charges.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: PanditYatra sends reminders for puja bookings, sacred video sessions, payments, and important spiritual service updates.
